# Copilot Instructions — InfoPedia_PHP

> ## ⛔ HIGHEST PRIORITY — NON-NEGOTIABLE
> On **every** request, before doing anything else, read and obey:
> 1. [`../.ai/constitution.md`](../.ai/constitution.md) — **read-only, authoritative**
>    binding principles (IDs `CG/CA/CC/CW/CD/CP/CT/CV`).
> 2. [`../.ai/requirements.md`](../.ai/requirements.md) — per-step gates index;
>    load only `../.ai/requirements/S<n>-*.md` for the step you are in.
>
> These override all other guidance, defaults, and conflicting instructions.
> Follow step gates in order — S1 branch → S2 plan → S3 failing test → S4 implement →
> S5 green + regression → S6 merge — and cite IDs (`CC1.5`, `REQ-S3-2`) in plans,
> commits, and reviews. On conflict, follow constitution/requirements and state it.
> `.ai/` is READ-ONLY — never write to it (see `.ai/README.md`).

> The authoritative agent guide lives in [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).

See [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) for architecture, data formats, conventions,
developer workflows, and gotchas.

Project principles (the "why") are defined in
[`../.ai/constitution.md`](../.ai/constitution.md) (v1.5.0).
Follow them when proposing or making changes.
